x-enumeration-literals.name: Collections Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Consolidate details about the outstanding debt and associated collateral. Ensure assets are properly booked.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Valuation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assess status of the title to collateral items and obtain current valuation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Liquidation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Undertake liquidation of collateral to recover losses

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collections Account Update
x-enumeration-literals.description: Revise the status of the account and review collections approach based on interim liquidations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debt Factoring
x-enumeration-literals.description: Consider factoring all or part of the residual debt
